# Design Review Checklist

## Visual Hierarchy

- Primary action is obvious
- Content order supports the core user task
- Typography and spacing create clear grouping

## Consistency

- Reuses existing components and tokens
- Interaction patterns match rest of product
- Terminology is consistent across screens

## Responsiveness

- Works from mobile to desktop
- No clipping/overlap at common breakpoints
- Touch interactions remain usable on small screens

## Accessibility

- Contrast meets WCAG AA baseline
- Keyboard navigation works end-to-end
- Focus indicators are visible and persistent
- Errors are understandable and actionable
